name: Dark Tunnel
description:
As your eyes adjust to the darkness, you see that you are in a
tunnel hewn out of the cliff rockbed.  A feeling in your gut tells you
that this tunnel was not made by ordinary creatures.  Little tracks
lead to and from a crude nest near the tunnel entrance.  A sudden
movement catches your eye and you see the fleeing form of some small
creature dashing outside through the rockfall.  You can explore the
tunnel more to the north or head back outside.
